seoTitle: Edgeroi vs Edith — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Edgeroi and Edith. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Edgeroi and Edith.
heading: Edgeroi vs Edith — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Edgeroi, New South Wales and Edith, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Edith has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Edgeroi (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Edgeroi or Edith safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Edgeroi has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Edith scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Edgeroi scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Edith scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Edgeroi or Edith?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Edith has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
